572 VA12A VA12A_NUTRITION_TR (VA12A) Nutritional Status Triggered CHAR 1 RAP summary: nutritional status - triggered. 0 = Not Triggered, 1 = Triggered, "-" = Determination precluded by missing data.
573 VA12B VA12B_NUTRITION_PC (VA12B) Nutritional Status Care Planning Decision CHAR 1 RAP summary: nutritional status - proceed with care. 0 = Not Triggered, 1 = Triggered, "-" = Determination precluded by missing data.
